name: Cleanaway Waste Management Limited
description: Cleanaway Waste Management Limited is Australia's leading total waste management, industrial, and environmental services company. Operating a national network of unique collection, recycling, treatment, and disposal assets, Cleanaway provides sustainable waste management solutions to municipal, commercial, and industrial customers. The company is committed to securing a sustainable future by recovering valuable resources from waste, reducing landfill reliance, and delivering high-quality environmental services across Australia.
